Class CardDTO

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs.CardDTO
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
BuildingDTO, EventDTO
public class CardDTO extends Object implements Serializable
DTO for a Mesos card, carrying the type, era, and any role-specific attributes (invention icon, shaman star, food discount, prestige points, hunter icon flag).
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected int
    eventID
    The unique event identifier; only meaningful for EventCard DTOs.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CardDTO(ArtistCard card)
    Constructs a CardDTO from an ArtistCard.
    CardDTO(BuilderCard card)
    Constructs a CardDTO from a BuilderCard.

    Constructs a CardDTO from a GathererCard.

    Constructs a CardDTO from a HuntersCard.

    Constructs a CardDTO from an InventorCard.

    Constructs a CardDTO from a ShamanCard.
    CardDTO(ERA era, int eventID, CARD_TYPE cardType)
    Constructs a CardDTO from EventCard.
    CardDTO(ERA era, CARD_TYPE cardType)
    Constructs a CardDTO with only the era and card type (no role-specific attributes).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getBuilderID()
    Returns the unique identifier of the builder associated with this card.
    CARD_TYPE
    getCardType()
    Returns the type of this card (tribe role, building, or event).
    ERA
    getEra()
    Returns the era this card belongs to.
    int
    getEventID()
    Returns the identifier of the event associated with this event card.
    int
    getFinalPrestigePoint()
    Returns the prestige points this builder awards at end of game.
    int
    getFoodDiscount()
    Returns the food discount this builder provides when buying a building.
    INV_ICON
    getInvIcon()
    Returns the invention icon on this card.
    SHAMAN_STAR
    getStarNumber()
    Returns the shaman star value of this card.
    boolean
    isHasIcon()
    Returns whether this hunter card carries an icon, which grants an immediate food bonus.
    String
    toString()
    Returns a human-readable string shown in the TUI describing the card's role-specific attributes.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • eventID

      protected int eventID
      The unique event identifier; only meaningful for EventCard DTOs.

  • Constructor Details

    • CardDTO

      public CardDTO(ArtistCard card)
      Constructs a CardDTO from an ArtistCard.
      Parameters:
      card - the source ArtistCard.

    • CardDTO

      public CardDTO(ERA era, CARD_TYPE cardType)
      Constructs a CardDTO with only the era and card type (no role-specific attributes).
      Parameters:
      era - the era this card belongs to.
      cardType - the type of this card.

    • CardDTO

      public CardDTO(ERA era, int eventID, CARD_TYPE cardType)
      Constructs a CardDTO from EventCard.
      Parameters:
      era - the era this card belongs to.
      eventID - the unique event identifier.
      cardType - the type of this card.

    • CardDTO

      public CardDTO(GathererCard card)
      Constructs a CardDTO from a GathererCard.
      Parameters:
      card - the source GathererCard.

    • CardDTO

      public CardDTO(HuntersCard card)
      Constructs a CardDTO from a HuntersCard. Carries the icon flag that determines whether the card grants a food bonus.
      Parameters:
      card - the source HuntersCard.

    • CardDTO

      public CardDTO(ShamanCard card)
      Constructs a CardDTO from a ShamanCard. Carries the star value used to calculate prestige points.
      Parameters:
      card - the source ShamanCard.

    • CardDTO

      public CardDTO(InventorCard card)
      Constructs a CardDTO from an InventorCard. Carries the invention icon used for set-completion scoring.
      Parameters:
      card - the source InventorCard.

    • CardDTO

      public CardDTO(BuilderCard card)
      Constructs a CardDTO from a BuilderCard. Carries the food discount on buildings and the end-game prestige points.
      Parameters:
      card - the source BuilderCard.

  • Method Details

    • getCardType

      public CARD_TYPE getCardType()
      Returns the type of this card (tribe role, building, or event).
      Returns:
      the card type.

    • getEra

      public ERA getEra()
      Returns the era this card belongs to.
      Returns:
      the era.

    • getInvIcon

      public INV_ICON getInvIcon()
      Returns the invention icon on this card.
      Returns:
      the invention icon, or null if not an inventor card.

    • getStarNumber

      public SHAMAN_STAR getStarNumber()
      Returns the shaman star value of this card.
      Returns:
      the shaman star value, or null if not a shaman card.

    • getFoodDiscount

      public int getFoodDiscount()
      Returns the food discount this builder provides when buying a building.
      Returns:
      the food discount, or 0 if not a builder card.

    • getFinalPrestigePoint

      public int getFinalPrestigePoint()
      Returns the prestige points this builder awards at end of game.
      Returns:
      the end-game prestige points, or 0 if not a builder card.

    • getBuilderID

      public int getBuilderID()
      Returns the unique identifier of the builder associated with this card.
      Returns:
      the builder ID, or 0 if the card is not of builder type.

    • getEventID

      public int getEventID()
      Returns the identifier of the event associated with this event card.
      Returns:
      the event ID, or 0 if the card is not of event type.

    • isHasIcon

      public boolean isHasIcon()
      Returns whether this hunter card carries an icon, which grants an immediate food bonus.
      Returns:
      true if this hunter card has an icon, false otherwise.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a human-readable string shown in the TUI describing the card's role-specific attributes.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
